amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 23 — paragraph 1 b (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 23 — paragraph 1 b (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

Any information obtained by a national competent authority or by the Commission pursuant to the provisions of this Article shall be considered a trade secret and be treated in compliance with the confidentiality obligations set out in Article 70.
parliament_text: Any information obtained by a national competent authority or by the Commission pursuant to the provisions of this Article shall be considered a trade secret and be treated in compliance with the confidentiality obligations set out in Article 70.
